scripts.install:all: npx npm-run-all --sequential install:swiftlint install:swiftformat install:flyctl config
scripts.update:submodules: git submodule foreach --recursive 'branch=$(git remote show origin | awk "/HEAD branch/ {print \$NF}"); git checkout $branch && git pull origin $branch' && CHANGED=$(git status --porcelain | grep '^ M \.dotfiles' || true) && if [ -n "$CHANGED" ]; then npm run config; fi && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: update submodules" || echo 'No changes to commit'
scripts.swift:build-and-run: sh -c 'cd "$1" && swift build && shift && swift run "$@"' --
scripts.autoscaler:creator: npm run swift:build-and-run ./SeleniumGridNodeMachineAutoscaler SeleniumGridNodeMachineAutoscaler autocreator
scripts.autoscaler:off_machines_destroyer: npm run swift:build-and-run ./SeleniumGridNodeMachineAutoscaler SeleniumGridNodeMachineAutoscaler autodestroyer offMachines
scripts.autoscaler:old_machines_destroyer: npm run swift:build-and-run ./SeleniumGridNodeMachineAutoscaler SeleniumGridNodeMachineAutoscaler autodestroyer oldMachines
scripts.deploy:backend:sandbox: npm run fly:config -- ../Backend/infra/fly/fly.toml sandbox | npm run deploy:to:fly
